repository_context.system_instructions:
You are an expert software engineer and architect. Review the 'directory_structure' to understand the project architecture, then review the code in the 'files' section.
CRITICAL RULES: 1. NEVER output an entire file unless explicitly asked to do so. 2. When suggesting changes, ONLY output the specific blocks or lines that need modification. 3. Clearly state which file you are modifying and provide surrounding context (a few lines above and below). 4. Think step-by-step: Briefly explain your reasoning BEFORE writing code. 5. Be direct, concise, and professional.
repository_context.directory_structure: - ./ - go.mod - internal/ - engine/ - generator.go - patterns/ - registry.go - types.go - main.go - templates/ - backends/ - core/ - cmd/ - server/ - main.go.tmpl - Dockerfile.tmpl - go.mod.tmpl - Makefile.tmpl - contracts/ - proto/ - buf.gen.yaml.tmpl - buf.yaml.tmpl - internal/ - ping/ - ping.go.tmpl - ping/ - v1/ - ping.proto.tmpl - frontends/ - svelte/ - .npmrc.tmpl - embed.go.tmpl - index.html.tmpl - package.json.tmpl - pnpm-workspace.yaml.tmpl - src/ - App.svelte.tmpl - main.ts.tmpl - vite-env.d.ts.tmpl - svelte.config.js.tmpl - tsconfig.json.tmpl - vite.config.ts.tmpl

files.file:
module catalyst
go 1.26.5
import { vitePreprocess } from '@sveltejs/vite-plugin-svelte' export default { preprocess: vitePreprocess() }

# Prioritize the offline zero-trust cache, but allow metadata fetching for fresh lockfile generation prefer-offline=true
# Allow developers to generate lockfiles locally (Cloud Build strictly overrides this to true!) frozen-lockfile=false

# Supply Chain Security: Prevent pulling packages published in the last 24 hours minimumReleaseAge: 1440
# Manage lifecycle script execution securely allowBuilds: esbuild: true svelte-preprocess: true

CEPHLODYNE_APP_NAME

Backend Status:

{statusMessage}
/// <reference types="svelte" /> /// <reference types="vite/client" />

{ "extends": "@tsconfig/svelte/tsconfig.json", "compilerOptions": { "target": "ESNext", "useDefineForClassFields": true, "module": "ESNext", "resolveJsonModule": true, "allowJs": true, "checkJs": true, "isolatedModules": true, "moduleResolution": "bundler", "strict": true, "sourceMap": true, "noEmit": true }, "include": ["src/**/*.d.ts", "src/**/*.ts", "src/**/*.js", "src/**/*.svelte"] }
version: v2 name: buf.build/cephlodyne/{{ .ProjectName }} lint: use: - DEFAULT breaking: use: - FILE
